paradigm: ready/ directory audit (separate git + gitignore divergence)

policy_divergence_findings.detail: main .gitignore enforces **/*.py ban (raw#9 strict); ready/ does NOT. ready/ allows .py files
policy_divergence_findings.consequence: ready/ may contain .py while main repo enforces hexa-only
policy_divergence_findings.remediation: either align ready/ to enforce raw#9 OR document divergence in policy memory

policy_divergence_findings.detail: 737 .py files exist in ready/ (allowed by ready/.gitignore)
policy_divergence_findings.consequence: raw#9 hexa-only invariant violated within ready/ scope
policy_divergence_findings.remediation: audit each .py purpose; convert to .hexa or quarantine in dedicated subdir

non_mutation_guarantee: helper does NOT modify ready/; read-only audit
